Believe It or Not... We'd Go Again!

Ripley's Believe It or Not! was such a fun and quirky experience! It's packed with bizarre facts, strange artifacts, interactive exhibits, and plenty of moments that make you stop and say, "No way!" We found ourselves laughing, taking tons of pictures, and reading almost every display because there was always something unexpected around the next corner.

It's a little cheesy in the best possible way and that's exactly what makes it so much fun. Whether you're visiting with family, friends, or just embracing your inner kid, it's a great way to kill some time. If you enjoy the weird, the unusual, and the downright unbelievable, this place is definitely worth checking out!
What a complete waste of money. The most boring place. Skip it and go to the wax musemes instead. Huge disappointment.

Ripley’s locations are all different so if you’ve been to one before, don’t expect this to be exactly the same. Yes, you still get the classic oddities like the tallest man in the world and various unusual and exotic exhibits, but this one has a much stronger film and music focus given its Hollywood location.

There are plenty of highlights whether you’re into films like Star Wars, musicians such as Elvis Presley and Michael Jackson, or actors like Marilyn Monroe. There really is a lot to see for everyone.

It is not the cheapest attraction so depending on how you see value for money, you might want to think twice if you are paying full price without a pass. But if you are a fan of any of the names or themes above, then it is definitely worth a visit.
